title: AutoTorch!
description: A client-side mod that automatically places torches at your feet when it gets dark. Fully configurable and pulls directly from your inventory!
body:
[![JOIN OUR DISCORD](https://img.shields.io/badge/JOIN%20OUR%20DISCORD-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE)

Client-side quality-of-life mod that automatically places a torch at your feet when it gets too dark. It is perfect for exploring caves, mines, and large dark structures where you want automatic lighting without the hassle of constantly placing torches manually.

**Client-side only** (no server installation required). **Fully compatible with singleplayer**.

**What it does:**
- Automatically checks the light level at your position.
- Places a torch under you when the local light drops below your configured threshold.
- Automatically pulls torches directly from your hotbar, offhand, or anywhere in your inventory.
- Prevents placement if there is no valid support block under your feet.
- Lets you toggle the feature on or off quickly using a custom keybind.

**Configuration:**
You can customize the mod's behavior through the in-game configuration screen in the mod list menu.

![A settings menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bff1372fcc5d095a48d3594ed63ea69d2c8f7110.png)

**Available settings:**
- Enable or disable auto torch placement.
- Only place torches when standing on the ground.
- Restore the previous hotbar slot after placing a torch from the inventory.
- Light threshold (0 to 15).
- Placement cooldown in ticks (prevents spamming torches).
- Reset to default values.

**Controls and commands:**
- Keybind to toggle auto torch placement (unbound by default, set in Controls).
- Keybind to open settings (unbound by default, set in Controls).
- Сlient commands: `/autotorchset` and `/autotorchset open`.

![Keybinds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f5558e931062463f91d1c584ba87b8dc0179dd9_0.webp)

**Details:**
- Client-side only (no server installation required).
- All settings are stored locally in your game config folder (`config/autotorchset.json`).
- Fully translated into 10 languages: English, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Brazilian Portuguese, Korean, and Italian.

**Please report any bugs, errors, or feature suggestions on Discord:** [https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE](https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE)
